# Sentra Healthcare AI

> AI-powered Clinical Decision Support for Indonesian Healthcare

## About

Sentra Healthcare Solutions builds AI diagnostic tools for clinicians in Indonesia. Founded in March 2025 by Dr. Ferdi Iskandar — a licensed physician with 15+ years of clinical experience and 10+ years as a hospital CEO.

Sentra transforms fragmented patient data into real-time diagnostic clarity, reducing misdiagnosis by 40% and enabling 3x faster clinical decisions.

## Products

- **Sentra Clinical Decision Support Engine** — 7-protocol AI diagnostic system (NLP synthesis, Bayesian algorithms, trajectory analysis, OCR, pharmaceutical guidance, referral automation, prognostic modeling)
- **Audrey AI Voice Assistant** — Bahasa Indonesia voice-enabled clinical consultation assistant
- **Clinical Trajectory Analysis** — Patient health trajectory visualization and prediction
- **Prognosis Intelligence** — AI-powered prognostic modeling
- **PKM Dashboard** — Integrated Puskesmas operations center

## Key Metrics

- 40% reduction in misdiagnosis
- 3x faster clinical decisions
- 97.2% emergency triage accuracy

## Technology

Built with Next.js, React, TypeScript. Deployed on Railway with Fastly CDN. Follows OWASP security baseline with immutable audit trails and zero-PHI-in-logs policy.

## Pilot Sites

- RSIA Melinda DHAI, Kediri, Jawa Timur
- Puskesmas Balowerti, Kediri
